query: SELECT CONCAT('User ', ul.userId, ': lat=', ul.latitude, ' lng=', ul.longitude, ' sharing=', ul.isSharing, ' updated=', ul.lastUpdated, ' minutesAgo=', TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, ul.lastUpdated, NOW()), ' name=', COALESCE(p.trainerName, u.name, 'unknown'), ' gender=', COALESCE(p.gender, 'null')) as info FROM userLocations ul JOIN users u ON ul.userId = u.id LEFT JOIN profiles p ON p.userId = u.id ORDER BY ul.lastUpdated DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4JQihNFt71oUk4Z.root --database DZLsNMXz8tKivpZtpPajU7 --execute SELECT CONCAT('User ', ul.userId, ': lat=', ul.latitude, ' lng=', ul.longitude, ' sharing=', ul.isSharing, ' updated=', ul.lastUpdated, ' minutesAgo=', TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, ul.lastUpdated, NOW()), ' name=', COALESCE(p.trainerName, u.name, 'unknown'), ' gender=', COALESCE(p.gender, 'null')) as info FROM userLocations ul JOIN users u ON ul.userId = u.id LEFT JOIN profiles p ON p.userId = u.id ORDER BY ul.lastUpdated DESC;
